outlook_paragraph: EOG Resources shows minimal satellite-detected drilling activity with only one newly active site and no continuously active sites at decision date, reflecting a 50% drop in relative activity. This weak operational signal, combined with a modest realized price discount and less than half exposure to the targeted segment, suggests constrained production growth into Q2 2021. With WTI averaging near $68.50 and drilling momentum well below recent trends, the deterministic revenue forecast settles at approximately $3.16B.
